capture.strategy: runtime forward hooks (register_forward_pre_hook/forward_hook with_kwargs) + vae.decode wrapper; no installed-package source mutation
capture.resolution: 64x64 (shapes only); production latent derived as image/32

components.name: text_encoder
components.returns: language_model (Qwen2.5-VL text stack; vision tower dropped)

components.name: transformer
components.returns: hybrid MM-DiT (20 dual-stream + 40 single-stream blocks, hidden 3584)

transformer_forward_signature: (hidden_states, timestep, encoder_hidden_states, encoder_attention_mask, timestep_r=None, encoder_hidden_states_2=None, encoder_attention_mask_2=None, guidance=None, attention_kwargs=None, return_dict=True)
note: params_estimate values are refined to exact numel counts from capture (io_spec.json) before weight_fit.json is finalized.
